text.value: Reference to draft CodeSystem urn:iso:std:iso:3166|20210120
Wrong Display Name 'Philippines' for urn:iso:std:iso:3166#PH. Valid display is 'Philippines (the)' (for the language(s) 'en')

Conformance resource /home/runner/work/ph-core/ph-core/fsh-generated/resources/CodeSystem-PHFDACPRCS.json - the canonical URL (http://doh.gov.ph/fhir/ph-core/CodeSystem/PHFDACPRCS) does not match the URL (https://verification.fda.gov.ph/). Use the special-url parameter if you really mean for it not to match
Reference to draft CodeSystem urn:iso:std:iso:3166|20210120
Wrong Display Name 'Philippines' for urn:iso:std:iso:3166#PH. Valid display is 'Philippines (the)' (for the language(s) 'en')
This property has only a code ('productInfo') and not a URI, so it has no clearly defined meaning in the terminology ecosystem
This property has only a code ('genericName') and not a URI, so it has no clearly defined meaning in the terminology ecosystem
This property has only a code ('dosageStrength') and not a URI, so it has no clearly defined meaning in the terminology ecosystem
This property has only a code ('dosageForm') and not a URI, so it has no clearly defined meaning in the terminology ecosystem
This property has only a code ('classification') and not a URI, so it has no clearly defined meaning in the terminology ecosystem
This property has only a code ('packaging') and not a URI, so it has no clearly defined meaning in the terminology ecosystem
This property has only a code ('pharmacologicCategory') and not a URI, so it has no clearly defined meaning in the terminology ecosystem
This property has only a code ('manufacturer') and not a URI, so it has no clearly defined meaning in the terminology ecosystem
This property has only a code ('countryOfOrigin') and not a URI, so it has no clearly defined meaning in the terminology ecosystem
This property has only a code ('trader') and not a URI, so it has no clearly defined meaning in the terminology ecosystem
This property has only a code ('importer') and not a URI, so it has no clearly defined meaning in the terminology ecosystem
This property has only a code ('distributor') and not a URI, so it has no clearly defined meaning in the terminology ecosystem
This property has only a code ('applicationType') and not a URI, so it has no clearly defined meaning in the terminology ecosystem
This property has only a code ('issuanceDate') and not a URI, so it has no clearly defined meaning in the terminology ecosystem
This property has only a code ('expiryDate') and not a URI, so it has no clearly defined meaning in the terminology ecosystem

Wrong Display Name 'Procedure carried out successfully' for http://snomed.info/sct#281501002. Valid display is one of 2 choices: 'Intra-abdominal digestive structure' (en) or 'Intra-abdominal digestive structure (body structure)' (en) (for the language(s) 'en')
Unknown code '181250006' in the CodeSystem 'http://snomed.info/sct' version 'http://snomed.info/sct/900000000000207008/version/20250201' (International Edition)
Unknown code '109721000' in the CodeSystem 'http://snomed.info/sct' version 'http://snomed.info/sct/900000000000207008/version/20250201' (International Edition)

Wrong Display Name 'Postsurgical wound care' for http://snomed.info/sct#18949003. Valid display is one of 8 choices: 'Change of dressing' (en), 'Change of dressing, NOS' (en), 'Reapplying a fresh dressing' (en), 'Renewing dressing' (en), 'Redressing wound' (en), 'Repeating dressing' (en), 'Change of dressing (procedure)' (en) or 'Dressing change' (en) (for the language(s) 'en')

Wrong Display Name 'Surgical instrument' for http://snomed.info/sct#363708005. Valid display is one of 2 choices: 'Temporally follows' (en) or 'Temporally follows (attribute)' (en) (for the language(s) 'en')

Wrong Display Name 'Fasting blood glucose measurement' for http://snomed.info/sct#271061004. Valid display is one of 5 choices: 'Random blood glucose measurement' (en), 'Random blood glucose level' (en), 'Random blood glucose measurement (procedure)' (en), 'RBG - Random blood glucose' (en) or 'Random blood glucose' (en) (for the language(s) 'en')
